entry.title: Home
entry.content:
Biography

I received his B.Eng in Mechanical Engineering from Wuhan University, China in 2018. Currently, he is pursuing his PhD degree in Biomedical Engineering, National University of Singapore (NUS).

My main areas of interest include biomedical robotics, reinforcement learning, autonomous control.

Education

01/2019 – present
Ph.D in Biomedical Engineering
National University of Singapore, Singapore
CAP: 4.70/5.0

09/2014 – 06/2018
B.Eng in Mechanical Engineering
Wuhan University, China
GPA: 3.75/4.0          Ranking: 3/148

Honors & Awards

09/2018 Excellent Graduate Thesis of Wuhan University
05/2018 Excellent Graduate of Wuhan University
entry.summary:
Biography

I received his B.Eng in Mechanical Enginee
